_comment: Local model context for the ai/ directory. Reads full model settings from model-map.json at project root.

models_in_use.local_flow: phrases.php checks phrases table row count. If fewer than 30 rows exist it calls GPT-4o mini to generate 60 ai-working phrases and stores them in ai/data/phrases.db. Called by the PHP backend when the UI requests phrases.
models_in_use.fallback: if the OpenAI call fails, phrases.php writes a built-in hardcoded fallback list to the database

models_in_use.local_flow: deepseek.php receives POST with messages array -> loads api_key from key file via AIConfig -> calls https://api.deepseek.com/chat/completions -> streams SSE tokens back to the browser. reasoning_content from deepseek-reasoner is surfaced separately when present.
models_in_use.fallback: sseError() sends an SSE error event and exits

models_in_use.local_role: agent run handler model override for preview task
models_in_use.local_flow: agent/run.php reads model_overrides from agent/prompts.json. If the requested task (e.g. 'preview') has a model_override, that value wins over whatever the client requested -- ensuring preview always uses Haiku regardless of UI selection.
models_in_use.fallback: if model_override is empty string the client-supplied model is used; if provider call fails jsonError() or sseError() is returned
